notes: Phase 1 local CI was reworked to match the requested repo-owned shape: ci/master_ci_runner.yaml plus scripts/run_ci.py.
The legacy local-ci.sh/local_ci.py shape is rejected by the professional lane and is not present in the repo.
CI lanes are quick, professional, release, and enterprise. The professional lane remains the phase-close gate.
No package.json, lockfile, framework, lint, typecheck, test, e2e, audit, or build tooling exists yet, so the CI manifest does not invent those checks.
Phase 2 remains the next candidate phase after this CI correction.
